TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ibrahim_Boubacar_Ke√Įta, title = Ibrahim_Boubacar_Ke√Įta, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ibrahim_Boubacar_Ke√Įta} }

S.FORM: I 1945 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Ibrahim Boubacar Ke√Įta , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Mali anini i ci Ibrahim Boubacar Ke√Įta, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 4 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ib~b~vrańßim b~b~vo~uo~u~ub~b~va ¶ar k…ô*ta , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ma…ĺi anini i ¶i ib~b~vrańßim b~b~vo~uo~u~ub~b~va ¶ar k…ô*ta, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1945 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Ibrahim Boubacar Ke√Įta , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Mali anini i ci Ibrahim Boubacar Ke√Įta, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 4 a romi'ad.
